title: Opening for Production Engineer at JK Tyre

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at JK Tyre
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
